creator: shige@kuis.kyoto-u.ac.jp
text:
Update ports for japanese/lynx-current.

Problem:
	No distfiles at original site.
	A distfiles for an old japanese/lynx-current ports is 
	lynx2.8.1dev.20.tar.gz

Solution:
	This patch (unified diff style).
	This update ports is for lynx2.8.1dev.22.tar.gz

	$ cd ${PORTSDIR}/japanese
	$ patch -p0 < [this patch]

Thank you.

--- shige

Fix: Unified diff style patch
